title: Parcel-Gilt Poetry.
content:
Let's strive to be the best; the gods, we know it,
    Pillars and men, hate an indifferent poet.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Parcel-Gilt Poetry."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
